languages.text: {n}Из последних сил Нунциус накрывает руки Эоганна изувеченной ладонью и кивает.{/n}
{n}With his last vestiges of strength, Nuncius clasps a mangled hand over Eogunn's and nods.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Из последних сил Нунциус накрывает руки Эоганна изувеченной ладонью и кивает.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}With his last vestiges of strength, Nuncius clasps a mangled hand over Eogunn's and nods.{/n}
{n}With his last vestiges of strength, Nuncius clasps a mangled hand over Eogunn's and nods.{/n}
{n}With his last vestiges of strength, Nuncius clasps a mangled hand over Eogunn's and nods.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nuncius reúne las pocas fuerzas que le quedan para cerrar su mano deforme en torno a la de Eogunn y asiente con la cabeza.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With his last vestiges of strength, Nuncius clasps a mangled hand over Eogunn's and nods.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Nuncius reúne las pocas fuerzas que le quedan para cerrar su mano deforme en torno a la de Eogunn y asiente con la cabeza.{/n}

languages.text: {n}努恩修斯使出最后一丝力气，用那只残破的手握住伊奥贡的手，然后点了点头。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With his last vestiges of strength, Nuncius clasps a mangled hand over Eogunn's and nods.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}努恩修斯使出最后一丝力气，用那只残破的手握住伊奥贡的手，然后点了点头。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Rassemblant les derniers vestiges de ses forces, Nuncius pose une main mutilée sur celle d'Eogunn et la serre en hochant la tête.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With his last vestiges of strength, Nuncius clasps a mangled hand over Eogunn's and nods.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Rassemblant les derniers vestiges de ses forces, Nuncius pose une main mutilée sur celle d'Eogunn et la serre en hochant la tête.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kalan son gücüyle Nuncius, parçalanmış elini Eogunn'un elinin üzerine kenetleyip başını sallıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With his last vestiges of strength, Nuncius clasps a mangled hand over Eogunn's and nods.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Kalan son gücüyle Nuncius, parçalanmış elini Eogunn'un elinin üzerine kenetleyip başını sallıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Mit einer letzten Anstrengung legt Nuncius eine verstümmelte Hand auf Eogunns Hand und nickt.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With his last vestiges of strength, Nuncius clasps a mangled hand over Eogunn's and nods.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Mit einer letzten Anstrengung legt Nuncius eine verstümmelte Hand auf Eogunns Hand und nickt.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ヌンキウスは、最後に残された力を振り絞り、ずたずたになった手をエオガンの手に重ね、うなずく。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With his last vestiges of strength, Nuncius clasps a mangled hand over Eogunn's and nods.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}ヌンキウスは、最後に残された力を振り絞り、ずたずたになった手をエオガンの手に重ね、うなずく。{/n}
